column1: # Single source for the four write-safety guards. tools/convert.{ps1,sh} renders this into each
# tool's hook-config format. All tools call the SAME shared scripts in .github/hooks/scripts/.
# Columns (tab-separated): id  phase  kind  script  timeout  message
# phase: pre = before the tool runs (can block); post = after (observe/log only)
# kind:  write = file edit/create/delete; shell = terminal command

column6: Blocking writes to immutable paths + git push/merge (human-only)
